Summary: since the submittal is missing the product listing page and project note needed to confirm whether the crew's conductor-sizing shortcut is permitted (insulation/temperature rating vs. termination temperature limits under NEC 110.14(C)/Table 310.16), the correct call is `needs_more_info` — hold that specific circuit's pull/termination until documentation is provided, while unaffected work can continue.
